channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: ESP LTD Tom Araya TA-204 FRX Electric Bass Black Satin — $699
item.description:
$699 · Brand New · Studio Gears

ESP LTD Tom Araya TA-204 FRX Electric Bass Black Satin

The TA-204 FRX delivers a thin, fast neck profile and a 35" extended scale that rewards aggressive playing with clarity and sustain. This signature model channels the low-end intensity Slayer demands, combining a lightweight basswood body with robust hardware and passive electronics for straightforward, no-frills performance. The black satin finish and pentagram inlays make the aesthetic commitment unmistakable.

Playability & Feel

A thin U neck contour with 24 extra-jumbo frets and 400mm fingerboard radius enable fast position shifts and aggressive technique across the entire 35" scale. The 40mm nut width and roasted jatoba fingerboard provide a stable, modern feel that cuts through dense mix scenarios.

Tone & Electronics

ESP Designed SB-4 pickups (SB-4N at neck, SB-4B at bridge) paired with passive Volume/Balance/Tone controls deliver a focused, articulate low end without digital interference. The LTD BB-604 bridge and black hardware ensure solid intonation and tonal transfer through the bolt-on construction.

Key Features
  • Bolt-on basswood body with black satin finish and Slayer pentagram inlays
  • Roasted jatoba fingerboard with 24 extra-jumbo frets
  • Maple neck with thin U contour and 400mm fingerboard radius
  • 35" extended scale for extended range and tonal clarity
  • 40mm molded nut width
  • ESP Designed SB-4N neck pickup and SB-4B bridge pickup
  • Passive electronics with Volume/Balance/Tone layout
  • LTD BB-604 bridge with black hardware
  • LTD tuners with black hardware
  • Factory-strung with D'Addario XL165 strings (.045/.065/.085/.105)
  • Compatible with FRX bass form-fit case (sold separately)

Built for players who prioritize speed, sustain, and uncompromising low-end aggression, the TA-204 FRX executes its design philosophy without compromise.

item.title: ESP LTD Tom Araya TA-604 FRX Signature Electric Bass Black Satin — $1,599
item.description:
$1,599 · Brand New · Studio Gears

ESP LTD Tom Araya TA-604 FRX Signature Electric Bass - Black Satin

The TA-604 FRX delivers a substantial, balanced feel in hand thanks to its neck-thru maple construction and thin U-shaped neck profile. This signature model combines professional-grade components with a refined black satin finish, designed for players who demand both precision and punch from their instrument. The 35" scale and aggressive active electronics make this bass equally suited to heavy styles and dynamic studio work.

Playability & Build

The 3-piece maple neck with rosewood fingerboard and 24 extra-jumbo frets offers fast action and clear articulation across the entire range. A 15.75" radius fingerboard maintains comfort during extended sessions, while the 40mm nut width provides definition between strings without sacrificing approachability. The neck-thru construction ensures solid sustain and resonance from bridge to headstock.

Tone & Electronics

Twin EMG 35DC active pickups deliver tight, punchy lows and articulate mids with minimal noise—ideal for modern bass playing. The active electronics layout includes dedicated volume, balance, and tone controls, granting precise shaping of your signal before it hits the amplifier. Coupled with the LTD BB-604 bridge and Grover tuners, this bass maintains pitch stability and tonal clarity in any setting.

Key Features
  • Maple body with neck-thru construction for superior sustain
  • 3-piece maple neck with thin U-shaped profile
  • Rosewood fingerboard with 24 extra-jumbo frets
  • 15.75" fingerboard radius for ergonomic comfort
  • 40mm molded nut width
  • Slayer pentagram fingerboard inlays
  • Dual EMG 35DC active pickups
  • Volume, balance, and tone control layout
  • 35" scale length
  • LTD BB-604 bridge
  • Black hardware throughout
  • Black satin finish with included hardshell case

This is a purpose-built instrument that combines signature-series credibility with the active tone-shaping tools and rock-solid construction serious players expect.

item.title: ESP LTD B-205SM Fretless Bass Guitar in Natural Stain Finish — $699
item.description:
$699 · Brand New · Studio Gears

ESP LTD B-205SM Fretless Bass Guitar in Natural Satin Finish

The B-205SM delivers the smooth, expressive character of a fretless instrument with a refined feel in hand. Its thin U neck contour pairs comfortably with the responsive 5-piece maple/rosewood construction, while the spalted maple top over ash provides both visual appeal and tonal clarity. This is an instrument built for players serious about fretless technique and tone shaping.

Playability & Build

The 34" scale with bolt-on construction ensures stable intonation and efficient neck response, while the rosewood fingerboard with 24 fret markers guides placement without restricting the expressive slides and bends that define fretless playing. The 45mm standard nut accommodates traditional fingerstyle technique across the string width.

Tone & Electronics

The paired ESP SB-5 humbucking pickups (bridge and neck) capture detailed low-end articulation and midrange definition, fed through the ESP ABQ-3 3-band active EQ with independent bass, mid, and treble boost/cut controls, balance, and volume. This electronics package gives you precise control over tone shaping without compromising the natural resonance of the instrument's body.

Key Features
  • Ash body with spalted maple top
  • Bolt-on construction with 34" scale
  • 5-piece maple/rosewood neck with thin U neck contour
  • Rosewood fingerboard (fretless with 24 fret markers)
  • 45mm standard nut
  • ESP SB-5 humbucking pickups (bridge and neck)
  • ESP ABQ-3 3-band active EQ with bass boost/cut, mid boost/cut, treble boost/cut, balance, and volume controls
  • Black nickel hardware
  • ESP tuners
  • BB-605 bridge with string-through-body design
  • Natural Satin (NS) finish

The B-205SM combines responsive construction, versatile active electronics, and fretless expressiveness in a professionally finished package ready for studio and live work.

item.title: Kramer Ferrington KFB-1 Acoustic Electric Bass White w/ Original Hardshell Case USA 1987-1989 — $900
item.description:
$900 · Very Good · Music Go Round Toledo

Condition: Very Good


Estimated Year: 1987-1989


Made in: USA (Neptune, New Jersey)


Includes Case/Gig Bag: Original Kramer Hardshell Case


Only accessories specifically listed in the Includes Case/Gig Bag section or shown in the photos are included. No additional accessories, software, cables, power supplies, manuals, boxes, or other items are included unless pictured or stated.


Used Kramer Ferrington KFB-1 Acoustic Electric Bass - White - USA Made


The Kramer Ferrington series was one of the most unique instrument lines of the late 1980s, blending the comfort and playability of an electric bass with the resonance and appearance of an acoustic instrument. Designed by renowned luthier Danny Ferrington, these USA-built basses remain highly sought after for their distinctive styling and surprisingly versatile sound.


Finished in White, this KFB-1 features the signature offset soundhole, slim maple bolt-on neck with rosewood fingerboard, under-saddle piezo pickup system, and onboard active 3-band EQ with Volume, Treble, and Bass controls. Whether played unplugged for practice or amplified on stage, it delivers the unmistakable Ferrington tone that made these instruments popular with touring musicians during the unplugged era.


This example includes its original Kramer hardshell case, making it an increasingly difficult package to find complete.


Features


• USA-made Kramer Ferrington KFB-1 Acoustic Electric Bass

• White finish

• Bolt-on maple neck

• Rosewood fingerboard

• Offset soundhole design

• Under-saddle piezo pickup

• Active onboard preamp

• Volume, Treble and Bass controls

• Original Kramer hardshell case included


Condition


This bass is in Very Good condition and has been inspected. The finish shows light cosmetic wear from normal use including a few minor scratches, small marks, and light edge wear. There is a small finish crack at the neck pocket on the bass side of the neck joint (see photos). This appears to be limited to the finish and does not show signs of structural movement. The neck is straight, hardware is in good condition, and the electronics function properly. The original case shows normal exterior wear from age and use but remains fully functional.


USA-made Ferrington basses have become increasingly collectible, especially original examples with the factory electronics and original case. Whether you're a collector, stage performer, or simply looking for one of the more unique acoustic-electric basses ever produced, this Kramer is an outstanding example.


Store Policies


• All of our used gear is tested before being listed and again prior to shipping.

• Ships the next business day.

• We ship to the Continental U.S. only.

• No trades on shipped items.

• Returns accepted within 48 hours of delivery. Buyer is responsible for return shipping and a 20% restocking fee.

• Please feel free to contact us with any questions before purchasing.

item.title: Fender Jazzmaster 1961 — $8,000
item.description:
$8,000 · Excellent · Dalia 's Gear Garage

1961 FENDER JAZZMASTER WITH GIG BAG. All switches and controls function properly with all of the unique Fender sounds that you expect. Whammy bar detaches and can be stored in the pocket of padded sturdy Fender bag. All original. Owned and retired from duty since 1989.

item.title: Ibanez AGB200L Artcore Bass Left Hand — $526.29
item.description:
$526.29 · Good · Left Hand Path

Beautiful left hand bass guitar.

Also not pictured is a soft case for this guitar.

Scaling down my lefty collection so it has it finds itself a new home.

Any questions, please don’t hesitate asking.

item.title: Dean Edge Bass 2010 - Dark grey black sparkly — $169
item.description:
$169 · Very Good · MeadowWood Oval

Bad ass Dean Bass

Hard to see in the pics, it's candy apple grey/candy apple black, and really sparkles in the right light.

Very solid bass

Excellent build quality

item.title: Westfield 4 string P.Bass Guitar Left Handed — $152.35
item.description:
$152.35 · Good · IMAG Music

Left Handed Westfield P Bass Guitar in Good Used Condition.


The guitar is listed as good rather than very good since the pickguard has discoloured (not really showing up on the photographs). Other than that, it just has expected usage marks. Came into the shop with some other guitars/amps low price to move on to a new home.

item.title: Takamine GB72CE-NAT G-Series Acoustic Electric Bass in Natural Finish — $899
item.description:
$899 · Brand New · LV Guitars

Takamine GB72CE-NAT G-Series Acoustic Electric Bass in Natural Finish

The GB72CE commands attention with its substantial jumbo body and responsive cutaway design, delivering the volume and projection expected from a serious acoustic bass. The slim mahogany neck paired with a 16"-radius bound rosewood fingerboard creates a comfortable playing platform that handles both fingerstyle and pick techniques with ease. This is a workhorse instrument built for players who need real acoustic output with reliable amplified sound.

Construction & Tone

A solid spruce top combined with flame maple back and sides produces the robust, resonant character that defines a quality jumbo bass. The dovetail neck joint and synthetic bone nut and bridge saddle ensure stable tuning and efficient energy transfer, while the rosewood headcap adds structural integrity and visual polish to the headstock.

Electronics & Playability

The onboard Takamine TK-40B preamp system eliminates the need for external gear, offering a built-in chromatic tuner, three-band EQ, gain controls, mid-shift control, bass-boost switch, and EQ bypass for comprehensive tone shaping. A 1.77" nut width provides standard spacing for bass playing, while the gold die-cast tuners, abalone rosette, and pearl dot inlays reflect the craftsmanship throughout.

Key Features
  • Solid spruce top with flame maple back and sides
  • Mahogany neck with 16"-radius bound rosewood fingerboard
  • Jumbo bass cutaway body style
  • Dovetail neck joint for stability and sustain
  • Synthetic bone nut and bridge saddle
  • Rosewood headcap
  • Takamine TK-40B preamp with built-in chromatic tuner
  • Three-band EQ, gain controls, mid-shift control, and bass-boost switch
  • Gold die-cast tuners
  • Abalone rosette and pearl dot fingerboard inlays
  • 1.77" nut width (4-string configuration)
  • Gloss natural finish

The GB72CE-NAT delivers commanding acoustic projection with modern amplified versatility, making it a dependable choice for studio work, live performance, and players who refuse to compromise on tone or reliability.

item.title: Fret-King Esprit IV Bass — $968.10
item.description:
$968.10 · Excellent · Trev Wilkinson Design, Archive Collection

Circa 2008 Blue Label model One piece Mahogany set Neck in Mahogany Body. See thru Amber .Rosewood fingerboard 12" radius . Fret-king design Wrapover bridge for ultimate tone transfer and sustain. Rock solid 34" long scale bass . great balance due to the body shape . Fret-King Pro series MIJ alnico V "P" and "J" pickups. Very rare and only a few made . NOS as new, never played

Shipped with original Fret-King Gigbag

Any questions and inspection are welcome, please do feel free to get in touch. Please do ask for more images of any part of the guitar you'd like to see in more detail.

These items are all new or near new and have been in storage since their build. Any slight imperfections, if there are any, have been shown as best as possible in all images.

item.title: Henry's Lizard DB2-04 Dragon Aged Black 2026 - Black — $799.26
item.description:
$799.26 · Brand New · GUITAR INN

                             Henry´s Lizard DB2-04 Dragon Aged WBlack



  • MODEL: db2-04 dragon
  • SERIES: lizard
  • COLOR: aged Black
  • WEIGHT: 4480 gr.
  • BODY WOOD: okoume
  • BODY FINISH: satin
  • NECK WOOD: roasted maple 
  • NECK PROFILE: medium "c"
  • NECK RADIUS: 13,75"
  • FRETS: 20 jumbo stainless steel
  • FRETBOARD: roasted maple
  • NUT: 42 mm bone
  • BRIDGE PICKUP: db-jb4 passiv 1
  • MIDDLE PICKUP: db-jb4 passiv 2
  • CONTROLS: volume, volume, tone
  • BRIDGE: vintage hardtail bridge
  • TUNERS: vintage style open
  • PICKGUARD: black
  • HARDWARE: nickel/chrome
  • CASE: -



Bei kundenspezifischen Umbauten ist die Rücknahme ausgeschlossen

item.title: Gibson SG Standard Bass Heritage Cherry — $1,475
item.description:
$1,475 · Excellent · Bgjersey

Like new condition. Bought new last year from Liberty Music and immediately upgraded to a new drop in hipshot bridge. Last two pictures show the new hipshot bridge. Original bridge included. Intonates perfectly now so I wouldn't change back but it is included. Strung with ernie ball cobalt flats. Feels and plays great. Just need to make room for (and finance) a new German made hofner

item.title: Hofner HI-Series Violin Bass Sunburst Short Scale Hollow Body Bass Guitar 2010's — $349.99
item.description:
$349.99 · Very Good · Music Go Round Toledo

Condition: Very Good


Estimated Year: 2010s


Made in: Indonesia


Includes Case/Gig Bag: None


Only accessories specifically listed in the Includes Case/Gig Bag section or shown in the photos are included. No additional accessories, software, cables, power supplies, manuals, boxes, or other items are included unless pictured or stated.


Used Hofner HI-Series Violin Bass Sunburst Short Scale Hollow Body Bass Guitar Made in Indonesia


The Hofner Violin Bass is one of the most recognizable bass designs ever produced, known for its lightweight feel, comfortable short-scale neck, and warm, woody tone. This HI-Series model, crafted in Indonesia, captures the classic Hofner styling while offering dependable modern construction and playability.


Finished in a beautiful Vintage Sunburst, this bass features a fully hollow violin-style body, dual Hofner humbucking pickups, a rosewood fingerboard with pearl dot inlays, floating wooden bridge, trapeze tailpiece, and the traditional Hofner control panel with individual pickup volume controls along with rhythm and solo switching for a wide variety of vintage-inspired sounds.


This bass has been tested and is fully functional. It plays comfortably with a smooth neck and produces the distinctive thump and warmth that has made the Hofner design a favorite for decades.


Features:


• Crafted in Indonesia

• HI-Series model

• Fully hollow violin-style body

• Short-scale neck

• Vintage Sunburst finish

• Rosewood fingerboard with pearl dot inlays

• Dual Hofner humbucking pickups

• Traditional Hofner control panel

• Floating wooden bridge

• Trapeze tailpiece

• Chrome hardware


Condition:


This bass is in very good used condition with light signs of normal use. There are a few minor surface scratches and light handling marks consistent with a previously owned instrument, but nothing that affects playability or structural integrity. The electronics function properly, the neck feels great, and the bass is ready to be played. Please review all photos carefully for the best representation of its cosmetic condition.


Thanks for looking! Feel free to reach out with any questions—we're happy to help.


Store Policies:


• All of our used gear is tested prior to listing and again before shipping.

• Ships the next business day (Monday–Friday) after payment clears.

• We ship to the Continental United States only.

• No trades on shipped items.

• Returns accepted within 48 hours of delivery. Buyer is responsible for return shipping, and a 20% restocking fee may apply.

• Please message us with any questions before purchasing.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Bongo 6 HS Mid-2000s - Black gloss — $2,500
item.description:
$2,500 · Very Good · Oscar's Boutique

A fine example of a mid-2000s Ernie Ball MusicMan Bongo 6HS with a new original preamp from Ernie Ball. Plays perfectly with low action and sounds massive. Very versatile with the HS pickup configuration and four band EQ. Includes an original hardcase. Will ship worldwide at buyers expense.

item.title: Gibson EB-5 120th Anniversary 5 string bass (2014) — $1,375
item.description:
$1,375 · Good · Alex

Selling my 2014 Gibson EB5, it’s a fantastic bass that’s served me well for the past decade. Plays and sounds great, good condition but cosmetically showing its age now with some road wear, dings, and chipped up volume knobs. Other than that it’s been treated well. Comes with OHSC + contents. Tried to photograph everything.


Tons of tonal versatility with this bass. Tappable pickups that you can individually swap between humbucker and single coil. Rock solid bridge and tuners too. All original.

item.title: Rare Yamaha BEX4 Semi-Hollow Bass 2000 - Amber Orange - Signed by Billy Sheehan — $797.57
item.description:
$797.57 · Excellent · Dave's Gear Shop

Description:

​Up for sale is a stunning and rare Yamaha BEX4 semi-hollow hybrid bass in the highly sought-after Amber Orange finish. Produced in May 2000 (Serial: QL12017), this instrument is a true collector’s piece that combines classic aesthetics with modern versatility.

​Condition & History:

​This bass has been a dedicated studio instrument kept in a strictly smoke-free environment. It has been used live only about 10 times and has been handled with extreme care. Cosmetic Condition: Near Mint / Excellent. There are a few very minor surface scratches in the clear coat, but they are practically invisible unless held at a specific angle under direct light. Electronics: 100% functional. The hybrid system (magnetic humbucker + bridge piezo) works perfectly, offering a massive range of tones from woody upright vibes to punchy rock.

​Frets & Playability: The frets show zero wear. The bass has been exclusively strung with flatwounds, preserving the fretboard perfectly.

Modifications/Issues: The plastic truss rod cover is missing (an easy part to replace or leave as-is for a "pro" look). Otherwise, the bass is all original.

​Premium Setup:

​The instrument is currently strung with a fresh set of Thomastik-Infeld JF344 Flatwounds. These strings are legendary for their smooth feel and deep, organic tone, perfectly complementing the semi-hollow body of the BEX4.

​The "Billy Sheehan" Connection:

​This particular bass carries a piece of music history. It was hand-signed by the legendary Billy Sheehan during his masterclass in Riga, Latvia, on September 2nd, 2008. The signature is clear and adds a unique provenance to an already rare instrument.

​

Specs at a Glance:

​Year: 2000 (Taiwan Factory)

​Body: Alder/Birch/Maple Semi-Hollow

​Finish: Translucent Amber Orange

​Pickups: Yamaha Humbucker + Piezo Bridge

​Scale: 34"

​Case: Includes a high-quality soft gig bag.

​Shipping:

​The bass will be packed with professional care. I use the "box-in-box" method with plenty of padding to ensure the semi-hollow body remains safe during transit. Shipping from Latvia (EU).

​International buyers outside the EU: Please note that import duties and taxes are the responsibility of the buyer.

item.title: Squier Badtz-Maru Bronco Bass 2006 - 2009 - Black — $1,500
item.description:
$1,500 · Good · Michael 's Gear Emporium

Works as it should it is a beautiful piece for your collection

item.description:
$250 · Fair · Vintage Guitars shop

Jolana Kolor Bass Guitar Vintage and Rare
Made in Czechoslovakia


CONDITION:

Bass Guitar is in working condition.
Watch the condition on the photo

Returns:

  • Sorry, but no returns.

SHIPPING:

  • WORLDWIDE

Note for the US customers:

The listed price already includes all U.S. import duties and taxes. In 99% of cases, you will not have to pay anything extra. Only in very rare situations, if U.S. Customs decides to recheck or hold the parcel, an additional fee may apply.

We can also offer express delivery to the USA within 7–10 days for an additional cost of $40.

item.title: Jet Guitars JPB-300 SGR 4 String Bass Green — $547.07
item.description:
$547.07 · Brand New · ProTone's Gear Locker

Welcome to Protone Music and here we have for sale is a brand new Jet Guitars JPB-300 Green.

JET Guitars are a new brand of electric guitars created for the enjoyment of players of all levels and abilities. Inspired by classic high-end guitars, JET guitars offer a modern approach to design and style with a fresh and exciting selection of colours, finishes, and high quality woods. Most importantly, JET guitars offer a premium playing experience at an affordable price.

Designed for bassists who value both performance and aesthetics, finished in luxurious green the JPB-300 is crafted with a roasted poplar body, roasted maple neck, and rosewood fretboard, this 4-string bass delivers exceptional playability and is equipped with a high-quality pickup system that delivers powerful, punchy lows and clear, articulate highs.

The ergonomic design and precision hardware combined with robust construction ensures this 4-string bass delivers exceptional playability and rich, resonant tones and can handle the demands of any playing style making it an ideal choice for both stage and studio.

Jet JPB-300 SG R Specifications

  • Machine head: Chrome, Vintage-style
  • Neck: Canadian roasted maple
  • Shape: Modern C
  • Fretboard: Rosewood
  • Radius: 12″
  • Nut Width: 1.5″
  • Nut: Bone
  • Truss rod: Double action
  • String Scale: 34″
  • Number of frets: 20
  • Body: Roasted poplar
  • Pickup: 2X PB style
  • Bridge: 2 points, 4 saddles
  • Pickguard: Red tortoise
  • Controls: 2 Volumes, 1 Tone
  • Strings: D’Addario
  • Hardware: Chrome
  • Colour: Green. All international customers please contact us first before purchasing to give you a accurate shipping quote as all international customers are responsible for the import taxes and duties when arrived at your country


If you require any more information please feel free to look us up, ProTone Music is a VAT registered business in the UK and are one of the uk's leading specialist dealers in high end, rare and preowned guitars and amplifiers, we pride ourselves on offering the best one on one customer service and advice, all our pictures are our own as we do all our photography in house so what you see is exactly what you receive

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay 4 Translucent Orange - brand new! — $4,760.42
item.description:
$4,760.42 · Brand New · MUSICFACTORY

Brand new instrument from the offcial Ernie Ball Music Man dealer.

item.title: Jet Guitars JJB-300 LPB 4 String Bass Guitar Lake Blue — $547.07
item.description:
$547.07 · Brand New · ProTone's Gear Locker

Welcome to Protone Music and here we have for sale is a brand new Jet Guitars JJB-300 Lake Blue.

The JET Guitars JJB-300 Bass blends classic design with dependable modern playability, delivering the punchy tone and familiar feel bassists expect from a traditional J-style instrument. Built with a roasted poplar body and finished in striking Gold, it offers a lively response with balanced lows, focused mids and clear highs. The full 34” scale length provides the tension and definition needed for confident bass performance, whether you’re laying down grooves in the studio or performing live.


A roasted Canadian maple neck paired with a rosewood fretboard creates a smooth and stable playing surface, while the comfortable Modern C neck profile makes longer playing sessions feel effortless. Two JB-style pickups deliver classic single-coil bass tone with plenty of articulation and punch, and the simple two-volume and master tone control layout allows quick tonal adjustments. With vintage-style chrome hardware, a tortoise pickguard and reliable components throughout, the JJB-300 offers classic bass style with dependable performance.

All international customers please contact us first before purchasing to give you a accurate shipping quote as all international customers are responsible for the import taxes and duties when arrived at your country


If you require any more information please feel free to look us up, ProTone Music is a VAT registered business in the UK and are one of the uk's leading specialist dealers in high end, rare and preowned guitars and amplifiers, we pride ourselves on offering the best one on one customer service and advice, all our pictures are our own as we do all our photography in house so what you see is exactly what you receive

item.title: Dean John Entwistle Hybrid Pro — $650
item.description:
$650 · Very Good · Jonathan's Gear Bazaar

A Dean John Entwistle Signature hybrid bass in a tobacco burst finish.

In overall good shape and plays well. Has a couple minor defects, one at the headstock side of the nut and some imperfections in the truss rod adjustment area, plus a small rough area on the side of the headstock.

Weight ~6.5 lbs by my luggage scale.

Good bass with a good sound and look looking for a new home.

item.title: CLEAN! 2021 Fender Made in Japan Aerodyne P-J Jazz Bass Black MIJ — $828.04
item.description:
$828.04 · Excellent · Nori's Gear Store

Don't forget to check my shop profile and other listings!!!

For International buyer, customs duty is buyer side's responsibility.

All item is As-is. All sales are final.

Very Clean J-Bass with PJ pickups. 34" scale.

Very light sign of wear.

Truss rod, Fret(9/10 intact), Action, Intonation and Electronics are all fully functional and comfortably set-up.

Weight: 4.14kg=9.13lb

Mod/Repair: None

Comes with: Nothing

Case: Fender Gig Bag

This guitar will be carefully packed and ready for immediate shipping (Usually in 36hours) with insurance and tracking.

To the U.S and Europe, delivery normally takes 5-9 days via EMS or Fedex.

item.title: Jet Guitars JJB-300 GDR 4 String Bass Guitar Gold — $547.07
item.description:
$547.07 · Brand New · ProTone's Gear Locker

Welcome to Protone Music and here we have for sale is a brand new Jet Guitars JJB-300 Gold.

The JET Guitars JJB-300 Bass blends classic design with dependable modern playability, delivering the punchy tone and familiar feel bassists expect from a traditional J-style instrument. Built with a roasted poplar body and finished in striking Gold, it offers a lively response with balanced lows, focused mids and clear highs. The full 34” scale length provides the tension and definition needed for confident bass performance, whether you’re laying down grooves in the studio or performing live.


A roasted Canadian maple neck paired with a rosewood fretboard creates a smooth and stable playing surface, while the comfortable Modern C neck profile makes longer playing sessions feel effortless. Two JB-style pickups deliver classic single-coil bass tone with plenty of articulation and punch, and the simple two-volume and master tone control layout allows quick tonal adjustments. With vintage-style chrome hardware, a tortoise pickguard and reliable components throughout, the JJB-300 offers classic bass style with dependable performance.

All international customers please contact us first before purchasing to give you a accurate shipping quote as all international customers are responsible for the import taxes and duties when arrived at your country


If you require any more information please feel free to look us up, ProTone Music is a VAT registered business in the UK and are one of the uk's leading specialist dealers in high end, rare and preowned guitars and amplifiers, we pride ourselves on offering the best one on one customer service and advice, all our pictures are our own as we do all our photography in house so what you see is exactly what you receive

item.title: 【used】Markbass / MB GV4 GLOXY CREAM GWS 3.870kg #IF0002209【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,179
item.description:
$1,179 · Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Markbass is currently one of the most popular bass amplifier brands in the world.

While it's well-known that they are an excellent bass amplifier manufacturer, they are also an excellent guitar brand.

This is a JB model from their GLOXY series, which achieves excellent quality while keeping the price down.

Although manufactured in China, every unit undergoes the same quality inspection as their high-end line at their Italian headquarters.

The body is made of alder, and the fingerboard is maple.

This combination offers an appealingly light midrange.

The pickups are Markbass JJ style, and the preamp is original.

Equipped with Markbass-made components, it offers exceptional value for money.

The sound is distinctly Markbass, with a wide range, rich harmonics, and a silky feel.

It seems to have been intentionally organized.

This is a must-try for Markbass fans, and also for musicians who don't want to compromise on playability and sound while keeping the price down.

The frets have approximately 80% remaining.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.
The body and paintwork have minor scratches and small dents. Some screws are rusted.
The electronics are in good condition.
No obvious modifications were observed.
Controls: Neck pickup volume, bridge pickup volume, passive tone (push-pull/active-passive), treble, middle, bass
Nut width: 36.1mm
Bridge string spacing: 19.0mm
Scale: 34 inches
Year of manufacture: Unknown
Country of manufacture: China

During setup, we use our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings.

These strings are characterized by their straightforward sound and stable playability, naturally bringing out the instrument's inherent character.

These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.

Please enjoy these strings, which aim to be a new standard for bassists.

We deliver the instrument after GIB's craftsmen have adjusted it for easy playability.

Accessories: Soft case (ARIA PB-EB)

Text: Tomoki Hayakawa

Inspection 담당: Ryuzaki

Product Photos: Miura

GIB 3-Month Warranty Included

◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)

・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.

●Re-Buyback Price Guarantee

If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee the buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.

●Defect Warranty

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. With the exception of some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.

The warranty period is 3 months for used products and 1 year for new products.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by a party other than our company.

* If the warranty certificate does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in, or if the wording has been altered.

* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.

(Warranty is only provided for purchases made in Japan.)

● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in

When you use our trade-in service at the time of purchase, the sales price will be 10% off. (Consignment items are excluded. This offer is only applicable if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the selling price.)

Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.

We will ship with sufficient packaging.

We also ship internationally.

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: Aria Pro II 1982 SB-1000 — $1,270.94
item.description:
$1,270.94 · Very Good · TC GAKKI

Welcome to TC Gakki! All photos are of the item for sale. Please note they are for sale in our store and may sell out. Thank you for looking! Feel free to ask any questions!

Product Details
________________________________

The legendary Aria Pro II SB-1000!

The SB (Super Bass) series is a flagship model of Aria Pro II basses.

With its original design and functional beauty, the SB series remains a popular model as a classic Japanese vintage instrument.

This particular instrument is a 1982 SB-1000. It was the top-of-the-line model in the series at the time, featuring a 6-position tone selector (BB circuit) with a low-pass filter. It boasts a luxurious wood construction, utilizing high-quality tonewoods typical of the 80s.

The use of brass parts, combined with the neck-through design, results in a rich, deep sustain.

While the nut width is slightly wider than a typical PB, the difference in string spacing from the low to high positions is minimal, and the neck thickness remains consistent, allowing for very smooth vertical and horizontal finger movement in the high register.

Enjoy a tight sound and extended sustain.

The unique midrange from the single pickup and the versatile sound provided by the tone selector are truly delightful!

【SPEC】 BODY: Canadian Ash
NECK: Maple/Walnut
FINGERBOARD: Ebony
P.U: Original
CONTROL: Vol / Tone / Rotary SW / Bypass SW
WEIGHT: 5.18kg
SCALE: 34”
NUT WIDTH: 45mm
w/Softcase

*Neck and electronics are in good condition, having been maintained by our repair technician.
*String height is set to approximately 1.6mm at the 12th fret.
*Parts have been disassembled and cleaned.

【Peace of Mind Service for Online Orders】
Please try out the product in your home environment for 6 days after arrival.
Even if it's not what you expected, that's okay.
We will refund the product price, and you only need to cover the round-trip shipping costs.
Please feel free to use this service.

*Thorough adjustments are made by our store, and a 5-year adjustment warranty is included.
*Please feel free to contact our staff for product details.

In charge : Oda
______________________________
Please note that all items are for sale in our Tokyo store.
There is a chance they might be sold out. All items are shipped tracked and insured. All import duties or customs fees are the buyers responsibility - please be aware of the requirements for your country. If you have any questions please ask.

item.title: Custom Fretless bass — $1,547.52
item.description:
$1,547.52 · Very Good · Hubacek - Guitars, Basses and Violins etc.

My third fretless bass, works as experimental prototype, played more than 150 concerts and hundreds of hours on rehersals and studio recordings.

Flame alder body, flame maple neck fith flame maple veneer. Ebony fingerboard, DiMarzio Ultra Jazz pickups, wooden covers, Schaller hardware. Position marks of every fret on side of the fingerboard.

item.title: 【used】Fender Japan / PB62 OWH 1993-1994 3.395kg #N066449 MADE IN JAPAN【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,179
item.description:
$1,179 · Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Fender is, of course, the number one brand of electric guitars and basses.

It's loved by countless top artists, including James Jamerson, Bobby Vega, and Michael League. (Titles omitted)

The Precision Bass was the world's first fretted solid-body electric bass, and it instantly captivated bassists worldwide.

Its brilliance remains unchanged and it continues to be loved even more than half a century after its creation.

Fender Japan started in the 1980s as a Japanese-made Fender, but unfortunately, it has now been discontinued and integrated into Fender itself.

However, the brand's quality is still supported by many artists and continues to be sought after.

The body is made of basswood, and the fingerboard is rosewood.

Basswood may not be the most popular wood, but its light, resonant tone seems to be particularly well-suited to the Precision Bass.

Its extremely light weight is also a major advantage.

The pickups are PB-Vintage.

This is an all-around Precision Bass that combines excellent playability, as expected from a Japanese-made instrument, with the open nuances characteristic of Fender.

The frets have approximately 70% remaining.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

The body and paintwork show signs of use, with scattered dents and scratches. Some tarnishing is visible on the metal parts. There are traces of sticker burn on the back of the body.

The electronics are in good condition.

The jack has been replaced. Some of the set screws on the bridge saddles have been replaced.

Controls: Volume, Tone
Nut Width: 42.5mm
Bridge String Spacing: 19.0mm
Scale Length: 34 Inch
Year of Manufacture: 1993-1994
Country of Manufacture: JAPAN

During setup, we used our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings.

Characterized by its straightforward sound and stable playability, these strings naturally bring out the instrument's inherent character.

These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.

Please enjoy these strings, aiming to be a new standard for bassists.

They are delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.

Accessories: Soft case

Text: Tomoki Hayakawa

Inspection 담당: Oshima

Product photos: Miura

GIB 3-month warranty included

◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)

・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.

● Guaranteed Buyback Price

If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee a buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.

● Warranty Against Defects

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. Excluding some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.

The warranty period is 3 months for used items and 1 year for new items.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by parties other than our company.

Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.

We also ship internationally.

item.title: Epiphone Thunderbird 64 Silver Mist — $808.20
item.description:
$808.20 · Brand New · Dijkmans Guitars

De Thunderbird die in 1964 de basswereld op zijn kop zette, nu in een tijdloze Silver Mist afwerking

De Epiphone Thunderbird 64 is een van de meest herkenbare basgitaren ooit gebouwd. Met zijn asymmetrische body, de reverse headstock en die onmiskenbare silhouet verwijst hij direct naar het origineel dat in de vroege jaren '60 de podia veroverde. In Silver Mist ziet de Thunderbird er niet alleen indrukwekkend uit, hij klinkt ook precies zoals je van een Thunderbird mag verwachten: vol, donker en met genoeg punch om zich te laten horen in elk ensemble.

De twee Probucker Bass humbuckers leveren een warm, krachtig geluid met een duidelijke laagte en voldoende definitie in de mids. Via de eenvoudige 2x volume, 1x tone bediening stel je snel je toon in, of je nu een ronde fingerstyle-sound zoekt of een agressievere aanpak met een plectrum. De mahonie/walnut hals met 60s Rounded Bass profiel ligt comfortabel in de hand en is via een set neck verbonden met de mahonie body, wat zorgt voor een goede sustain en een directe toonoverdracht.

De Indian Laurel fretboard heeft 20 frets met dot inlays op een 34" schaallengte met 12" radius, wat de Thunderbird 64 geschikt maakt voor bassisten van elk niveau. De open-gear tuners met historische clover buttons en een 19:1 tandwielverhouding zorgen voor nauwkeurig en stabiel stemmen. De Epiphone Vintage Bass Tune-O-Matic brug completeert het vintage karakter van dit instrument.

Een iconische basgitaar met een tijdloze uitstraling, voor de bassist die wil opvallen zonder in te leveren op toon.

item.title: ESP 400 Series 1986 - Sunburst — $1,523.48
item.description:
$1,523.48 · Very Good · Angus's Boutique

Fantastic mid-80s ESP in pretty remarkable condition.

Rare: not seen another in the UK with Fender-style headstock, this colour, or PJ config.

P-bass neck (around 42mm nut), and reasonably flat. AMAZING finish and condition.

Looks like an ebony fretboard which is also in immaculate condition. Nice to have the extra fret for that top E.

Body is alder. 4.4 kg.

Comes with d-tuner, fresh flat wound strings, a fitted hard case, and strap locks.

Bought from bass direct in 2024. Really excellent instrument, not just saying for the ad. Resonant, full, and precise sounding.

I'd love to keep it but I'm not using enough to justify.

Will ship in an insured and padded cardboard box.

Here is Bass Direct page

item.title: AS NEW & RARE! 2012 Fender Japan Jazz Bass Limited JB62M VWH 32" Medium Scale MIJ — $1,277.36
item.description:
$1,277.36 · Excellent · Nori's Gear Store

Don't forget to check my shop profile and other listings!!!

For International buyer, customs duty is buyer side's responsibility.

All item is As-is. All sales are final.

Super Clean 32" medium scale J-Bass with alder body, not basswood.

Some hardwares(mostly tuning pegs) have oxidization.

Pickguard still has plastic film on.

Truss rod, Fret(9/10 intact), Action, Intonation and Electronics are all fully functional and comfortably set-up.

Weight: 3.8kg=8.38lb

Mod/Repair: None

Comes with: Nothing

Case: Fender Gig Bag


This guitar will be carefully packed and ready for immediate shipping (Usually in 36hours) with insurance and tracking.

To the U.S and Europe, delivery normally takes 5-9 days via EMS or Fedex.

item.title: MihaDo Cosmic Gothic 5-String Multiscale Bass 34"/32" | Fanned Fret | Handcrafted Boutique — $2,976.01
item.description:
$2,976.01 · Brand New · MihaDo GS

A premium custom instrument. Bass Cosmic Gothic Multiscale 34"/32" by MihaDo GS.
This bass guitar combines flawless ergonomics, balanced tone, and carefully designed electronics.
The body features an exclusive pattern that exists only in this single instrument — there will never be another like it.

This is a bass for those who value:

  • comfort and effortless playability
  • stable tuning
  • rich, expressive premium tone
  • exclusivity and unique design

Perfect for both studio recording and live performance.

Specification:

Body: Mahogany

Fingerboard: Pau Ferro

Neck: Flame Maple

Strings: 5

Frets: 24

Pickup: 2 x single Delano JSBC 5HE

Electronics: volume, blend, tone

Actual Scale: 34"/32"

Dimensions: 99 x 29 x 4 cm (39.0 × 11.4 × 1.6 in)

Tuners: 5 x monorail bridge black

String Spacing: 18 mm

Factory tuning: B0 std.

String gauge: 40-130

Weight: 7.7 lbs (3.5 kg)

The gig bag is included!

This model can be in the Left-handed version!

Be aware that your order will take a minimum of 4-5 months to process.

If you are interested in versions with 4 or 6 strings, or a different color, please feel free to write to us.

We will be happy to build the guitar of your dreams!

Please note that international shipments may be subject to additional taxes, customs duties, and fees imposed by the destination country. These charges are not included in the item price or shipping cost and are the buyer's responsibility.

item.title: 【used】Bacchus / Twenty Four Ash Custom 5 3.890kg #102882【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,933
item.description:
$1,933 · Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Bacchus is a Japanese brand based in Nagano.

It's a brand under the Deviser umbrella, which owns a large guitar factory called the Asuka Factory. The high quality of their guitars, thanks to their in-house factory operations, is highly regarded by many musicians.

This is a rare Custom model from the Bacchus Handmade Series, the Twenty Four Ash Custom 5.

Based on the logo, serial number, and other detailed specifications, it appears to be a guitar manufactured in the early to mid-2000s, a period when woodworking techniques and unique parts development were most passionately integrated.

Furthermore, this model is listed in the 2005 catalog.

The body is made of 2-piece ash.

The neck is made of 3-piece maple, and the fingerboard is also made of maple.

This classic combination of woods produces tight, well-defined bass and clear, articulate treble.

The neck joint uses a 6-bolt construction.

The guitar features a heel cut, ensuring playability in the higher positions while maintaining robust rigidity to transmit the vibrations of the 5th string's low B string to the body without loss.

The hardware retains its original specifications, including features not found in current models.

The bridge is a "BACCHUS DB" with separate saddle and tailpiece sections.

The tuners are GOTOH GB7s, renowned for their high precision.

The electronics also retain the original specifications, reflecting the meticulous attention to detail of the time.

The pickup is an HMC JB-ALV housed in a wooden cover.

Equipped with an Alnico 5 magnet, it's a top-of-the-line hand-wound pickup from Bacchus, offering a modern attack that cuts through with slap bass.

The preamp is the original HMC EB-1 2-band EQ.

The low frequencies are very massive, while the high frequencies have a sharp edge and bite.

The sound has a clear attack and a tight, crisp, and superb tone.

With its quick response, this bass meets the demands of players in modern technical playing styles and percussive slap techniques at a high level.

It boasts exceptional quality, characteristic of early Asuka factory production, packed with unique, meticulously crafted parts not found in current series.

This is a highly recommended instrument for technical bass players and those seeking a reliable, high-quality 5-string bass for live performance.

Fret life is approximately 80%.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

There are scattered scratches on the body and paintwork. There are scattered dents of approximately 10.0mm to 15.0mm on the side of the body.

The electronics are in good condition.

No obvious modifications were observed.

Controls: Master Volume, Balancer, Treble, Bass, Active/Passive Switch
Nut Width: 46.3mm
Bridge String Spacing: 18.0mm
Scale Length: 34 Inch
Year of Manufacture: Unknown
Country of Manufacture: JAPAN

During setup, we use our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings.

These strings are characterized by their straightforward sound and stable playability, naturally bringing out the instrument's inherent character.

These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.

Please enjoy these strings, which aim to be a new standard for bassists.

Delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.

Accessories: Gig bag

Text: Tomoki Hayakawa

Inspection 담당: Hirayama

Product Photos: Miura

GIB 3-Month Warranty Included

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)

・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

●Defect Warranty

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. With the exception of some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.

The warranty period is 3 months for used products and 1 year for new products.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

item.title: Sadowsky MetroExpress P/J 5 (Body Only) — $261.76
item.description:
$261.76 · Excellent · Electric Bass

Sadowsky MetroExpress 5 string loaded bass body.

**Please note this sale is for the loaded bass body shown only - NO NECK**

Body is in really great condition with the protective plastic still on on places. Body is loaded with pickups, electronics and hardware.

No bolts or tuners included. Just the body and electronics.

These basses have quite a wide neck pocket so I would doubt if anything apart from a Sadowsky 5 string neck will fit. Unless you are able to fashion a custom neck to fit it.

Will be sent by weekday courier.

**No returns based on 'my neck won't fit'. As stated, this will probably need a proper Sadowsky neck or will need a custom made option. It won't work with a F****r type neck.

item.title: Waterstone TP8 8-String Bass 2024 - Matte Black — $695
item.description:
$695 · Excellent · Kebo's Bass Works

When considering any purchase, know exactly who you are dealing with. Please read our ‘about us’ page.

This bass is stupid clean - not a mark on it. GREAT neck, low action, set up perfectly, fresh strings and ready to go. You see these advertised but never seem to be in stock. This is an awesome professional level bass. Comes with the original hard rectangular gig bag.

We're pros at KBW. We stand behind every item we sell. Nothing is ever a final sale especially since you worked hard for your money. We buy so much misdescribed junk its not even funny and we promise a peace of mind experience. Thank you for your consideration.

item.title: Ibanez SR 506, 2005 - Mahogany — $677.26
item.description:
$677.26 · Fair · Electric Bass

Ibanez SR506 6 String (Pre-owned)

Age/Origin: Est 2005, Made in Korea,
Type: Ibanez SR506 6 String, fretted
Body: Mahogany
Body thickness:
Top/Back: N/A
Neck: 5 piece bolt on
Fretboard: Rosewood with markers
Nut: Nylon
Neck Width/Nut:
Neck Width/12th Fret:
Tuners: Closed type
Strings: Unknown, good quality/condition
Bridge: Ibanez high mass
Active/Passive: Active
Pickups: Ibanez 6 String
Preamp: Volume, PU pan, Bass, Mid, Treb EQ, Active/Passive switch
Side dot markers: Yes
Case: No / Weight: TBC

Condition:

Fair condition. The bass is not in bad order but as you will see from the pictures there are a few marks here and there from previous ownership. We always take a lot of pictures so please have a good look at these on the site.

Summary:

A really good entry into the 6 string world, these basses are well made and really easy to handle.

The bass plays very well and has a nice medium action.

Pre Sale Service/Work:

Set up, clean and full check.

No case included.

Comments:

Always an adventure moving into the multi string bass world for the first time. It’s true to say that you can do things on these that would be impossible on a 4/5. Plus, for reading parts in the higher resister going across the fingerboard in the same position is easier than going up the neck!

*Disclaimer. With regard to second hand instruments, the description and information provided above is always given to the best of our knowledge and where possible we reference the original manufacturers specifications. Please ask any questions you want to in this regard and of course feel free to do your own research. We will not be held liable for any genuine mistakes made in our descriptions or specifications.

item.title: Mazeti 7 String Bass — $815.75
item.description:
$815.75 · Very Good · Electric Bass

Mazeti 7 String (Pre-owned)

Age/Origin: Est 2000's, possibly Korea/Vietnam,
Type: Mazeti 7 String, fretted
Body: Ash
Body thickness: 40mm
Top/Back: Burl
Neck: 7 piece bolt on / Dual truss rod
Fretboard: Rosewood, no markers
Nut: Nylon
Neck Width Nut: 62mm
Neck Width 12th Fret: 90mm
Tuners: Closed type
Strings: Unknown, good quality/condition
Bridge: Individual bridge pieces
Active/Passive: Active
Pickups: Mazeti 7 String
Preamp: Volume, PU pan, Bass, Mid, Treb EQ, Active/Passive switch
Side dot markers: Yes
Case: No / Weight: 11.68lbs / 5.3Kg

Here we have great Mazeti bass, this one is a 7 string fretted and unlike some of the others we've seen in terms of construction featuring a lovely burl top and back. 

This bass is in really nice order and looks like it has hardly been played with the plastic still intact on the back control cover.

Being a 7 string, the bass has some presence, heft and weight to it so please be aware of this if considering purchasing. The action is great and it plays quite low if you want it to.

Really nice burl top and back and for the money a really nice thing to own! You could certainly pay an awful lot more for a bass that looks like this one.

Condition:

Really good, looks as if it's hardly been played with plastic still on the control cover.

Summary:

Low cost but still a good quality 7 string bass, great condition. A step into multi string territory for little outlay! It's a weighty bass at 11.68lbs so please be aware of this if considering this bass.

Comments:

Always an adventure moving into the multi string bass world. Some turn up their noses at these kind of basses but it's true to say that you can do things on these that would be impossible on a 4/5. Plus, for reading parts in the higher resister going across the fingerboard in the same position is easier than going up the neck!

*Disclaimer. With regard to second hand instruments, the description and information provided above is always given to the best of our knowledge and where possible we reference the original manufacturers specifications. Please ask any questions you want to in this regard and of course feel free to do your own research. We will not be held liable for any genuine mistakes made in our descriptions or specifications.

item.title: Sire V7 2017 - Natural — $677.26
item.description:
$677.26 · Very Good · Electric Bass

Sire V7 5 (Pre-owned)

Age/Origin: Est 2017, Made in Indonesia
Type: 5 String, fretted
Body: Ash
Body thickness:
Top/Back: N/A
Neck: Maple 1 piece bolt on
Fretboard: Maple, blocks
Nut: Nylon
Neck Width Nut: 45mm
Neck Width 12th Fret: 70mm
Tuners: Traditional open vintage type
Bridge: Sire High Mass
Active/Passive: Active
Pickups: Sire Jazz 5
Preamp: Master volume, Master tone, PU blend, Bass, Mid boost/freq, Treb EQ, Active/Passive switch. See Sire site for configuration.
Side dot markers: Yes
Case: No / Weight: 10.34lbs

One of the earlier V1 V7 Sire 5 string basses. Plays really nicely and very versatile with the active/passive preamp.

Condition:

Really good, very few marks and nothing at all bad. Not really been played that much at all. We always take a lot of pictures so please have a good look at them for overall condition.

Summary:

Pre Sale Service/Work:

Set up, clean and full check. Fairly new set of Dogal Nickelsteel round wound strings fitted, quite a low action on the bass which plays really well.

Comments:

These are great basses, giving a great many tones and options. 5 string version always nice and the classic natural ash finish always works on a J type bass.

*Disclaimer. With regard to second hand instruments, the description and information provided above is always given to the best of our knowledge and where possible we reference the original manufacturers specifications. Please ask any questions you want to in this regard and of course feel free to do your own research. We will not be held liable for any genuine mistakes made in our descriptions or specifications.

item.title: Gibson Thunderbird 2022 - Inverness Green — $1,395
item.description:
$1,395 · Very Good · Kebo's Bass Works

When considering any purchase, know exactly who you are dealing with. Please read our ‘about us’ page.

If you're looking for an absolutely great playing bass that is issue free, this is your bass. Cosmetically, she does have wear as someone gigged with this bass. We have an expression at KBW - Great Basses Get Played and this is no exception. Stupid low action, every note rings true, plays and sounds great. Has the orig hard case. All orig with the exception of the top hat knobs were swapped for a more authentic set of top hats. Cosmetically, like we said, this one was played. Has checking, a chip on the finish of the headstock, minor chips here and there (2 or 3) and what looks like decal glue under the bridge. We hate to use Goof Off on finishes but some people do. We left the 'glue' - Its not bad but we describe EVERYTHING. Also has some jean rivet wear on the back but not into or thru the finish. This bass is so good, I'm gonna use it at my next gig.

We're pros at KBW. We stand behind every item we sell. Nothing is ever a final sale especially since you worked hard for your money. We buy so much misdescribed junk its not even funny and we promise a peace of mind experience. Thank you for your consideration.

item.title: 【used】Three Dots / JB Plus OWH 3.980kg #T946【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $2,122
item.description:
$2,122 · Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Three Dots is a new brand created by Yoshiyuki Kikuchi (and Okada International), who has earned immense trust from many professional bassists, particularly for his work with Sadowsky.

This model is an ambitious creation that fully incorporates Mr. Kikuchi's intentions, based on the traditional JB bass.

This is an active model.

The body is made of alder, and the fingerboard is Indian rosewood.

This is a classic combination with a rich midrange.

The pickups are an original design.

These pickups reference the sound of vintage Fender basses used by professional musicians in the field.

After much trial and error, these pickups were perfected, and while the sound is not flashy, it has a well-balanced sound from low to high frequencies, and the overall finish is very refined.

The preamp uses an EMG BTC.

It features a 2-band equalizer with treble and bass controls, each with 12dB of boost/cut range.

This combination is excellent, providing a wide range while being powerful and fast.

Overall, it boasts a well-balanced sound, and combined with its hyper-smooth playability, it delivers a high level of quality.

Its balanced sound—moderately flashy without being overpowering in an ensemble—and its refined, smooth playability will make it a strong ally in various situations.

Fret life is approximately 80%.

The truss rod is in good condition.

The neck is in good condition.

The body and paintwork show some minor scratches overall, but no noticeable damage.

The electronics are in good condition.

No obvious modifications were observed.

Controls: Neck pickup volume, bridge pickup volume, treble/bass
Nut width: 38.1mm
Bridge string spacing: 20.0mm
Scale length: 34 inches
Year of manufacture: Unknown
Country of manufacture: Japan

During setup, we used our original GIB BASIC / Standard Bass Strings.

Characterized by its natural sound and stable playability, these strings naturally bring out the instrument's inherent character.

These are highly reliable strings that we actually use in our repair and setup workshops.

Please enjoy these strings, aiming to be a new standard for bassists.

They are delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by GIB's craftsmen.

Accessories: Soft case (ARIA PB-EB)

Text: Tomoki Hayakawa

Inspection 담당: Hirayama

Product photos: Miura

GIB 3-month warranty included

◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)

・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.

● Guaranteed Buyback Price

If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee a buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.

● Warranty Against Defects

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. Excluding some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.

The warranty period is 3 months for used items and 1 year for new items.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by parties other than our company.

* If the warranty card does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in. Or, if the wording has been altered.

* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.

(Warranty is only valid for purchases made within Japan.)

● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in

When you purchase an item, you will receive a 10% discount on the sales price when you use our trade-in service. (Consignment items are excluded. This discount applies only if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the sales price.)

Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.

We ship with sufficient packaging.

We also ship internationally.

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: 4 String Short Scale Neck Through Bass/6 String Tremolo Busuyi Double Side, Headless Guitar Fretless — $375
item.description:
$375 · Mint · Asi's Gear Depot

  • Tremolo Bridge + Tremolo lock
  • Fretless/ Fretless
  • Headless Bass & Guitar model
  • Double sides, dual jack
  • Maplewood fretboard
  • Short Scale bass, fun to play
  • Buy here, its $1,128.00 on eBay
  • Join style: set neck( neck through body)
  • body: basswood wood
  • neck: maple wood
  • fingerboard radium: 13 inch
  • fingerboard: maple neck
  • truss rod: double adjust
  • pickups: passive pickups.
  • control : 1V. 1T.1-3 way toggle one jack output.(guitar side)
  • . 1V.2T. one jack out put.(bass side)
  • bridge: headless bridge( guitar and bass)
  • scale length 648mm for guitar.
  • 864mm for bass.
